title: OP loot datapack
description: This datapack lets you run a command that gives you a shulker box full of OP loot!
body:
# **OP loot datapack**
This datapack lets you run a new command to get a shulker box full of OP loot!
## **Contents**
- Fully maxed netherite gear, tools, and weapons
- Maxed Elytra and 3 stacks of rockets
- Maxed bow and crossbow with 2 stacks of harming 2 arrows
- A stack of enchanted golden apples
- Some other good stuff!
## Notes
This datapack can be safely added to an existing world without any concerns!
